BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  served in the Scottish and French wars, govenor of Buckingham Castle and Forest, and was summoned to Parliament, 25 Edward I to 7 Edward II. 

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ENGLISHNOBI …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan la Zouche於1267年10月9日出生在英國戴文諾斯 莫爾頓時，他的父親Roger de  Zouche25歲，母親Ela Longespée23歲。他於1287年與Eleanor de Seagrave在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 馬尼亞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1288年登記服兵役。他去世於1314年3月25日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利 聖 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan la Zouche于1267年10月9日出生在英国戴文諾斯 莫爾頓时，他的父亲Roger de  Zouche25岁，母亲Ela Longespée23岁。他于1287年与Eleanor de Seagrave在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 馬尼亞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1288年登记服兵役。他去世于1314年3月25日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利 聖 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan la Zouche was born on 9 October 1267, in North Molton, Devon, England, his father, Roger de  Zouche, was 25 and his mother, Ela Longespée, was 23. He married Eleanor de Seagrave in 1287, in Ashby Magna, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1288. He died on 25 March 1314, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan la Zouche est né le 9 octobre 1267, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Roger de  Zouche, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ela Longespée, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Seagrave en 1287, à Ashby Magna, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1288. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1314, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1287 in Ashby Magna, Leicestershire, England Eleanor de Seagrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1288 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. März 1314 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan la Zoucheが1267年10月9日にイギリスデボンノース モルトンで生まれた時，父Roger de  Zoucheは25歳，母Ela Longespéeは23歳であった。1287年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー マグナでEleanor de Seagraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年に兵役登録をした。彼は1314年3月25日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリー スト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라클리 스트 피터
ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan la Zouche(이)가 1267년 10월 9일 영국 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de  Zouche(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Longespée(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1287년 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 매그나에서 Eleanor de Seagrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1314년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라클리 스트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1267–25 March 1314: 9 de outubro de 1267–25 de março de 1314
pt.North Molton, Devon, England: North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan la Zouche nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1267, em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de  Zouche, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ela Longespée, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Seagrave em 1287, em Ashby Magna, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1288. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1314, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan la Zouche родился 9 октября 1267 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de  Zouche было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Longespée, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Seagrave в 1287 г. в местности ашби магна, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1288 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 марта 1314 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности браккли ст питир, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan la Zouche nació el 9 de octubre de 1267, en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de  Zouche, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ela Longespée, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Seagrave en 1287, en Ashby Magna, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1288. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1314, en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Brackley St Peter, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
